title: Update coap_client.c, coap_dtn.c and other call sites to use oscore_ctx accessors only (no direct struct member access)
description: Scan all files using oscore_ctx and replace any direct field access (e.g. ctx->sender_seq, ctx->active, ctx->replay_window etc.) with new accessor functions. Update lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/ files and any others. Ensure compilation and tests pass. P0.
